# Qfloww

> Qfloww provides branded booking pages and queue-management panels for clinics, salons, and consulting firms.

Qfloww lets a business publish a `/book/{business-name}` URL, accept appointments,
run a daily queue, and manage services and slots. Business owners, invited doctors,
and platform administrators have separate panels.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview.
- [Book](/book/example): Tenant booking page.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a business account.
- [Log in](/login): Owner, doctor, and admin sign-in.
- [Contact](/contact): Qfloww contact information.
